net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.input

Class Input

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.jface.window.Window
      • org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
        • org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.TrayDialog
          • org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.TitleAreaDialog
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.input.Input
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.eclipse.jface.window.IShellProvider

    public class Input
extends org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.TitleAreaDialog
    This class generates a dialog which can get various parameters or give output to the user. You decide.
    Since:
    0.5
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann

    • Constructor Detail

      • Input

        public Input(Input.WindowType windowType,
             java.lang.String message,
             int messageType)
        This method generates the input dialog.
        Parameters:
        windowType - is the type of the dialog. USE WindowType.(...)
        message - is the message of the dialog
        messageType - is the message type. USE IMessageProvider.(...)
